title: Usizo Nokwesekwa
description: Sikhona ukuze sisize nganoma imiphi imibuzo noma izinkinga ongahlangabezana nazo ngenkathi usebenzisa uhlelo lwethu lwewebhu. Kungakhathaliseki ukuthi udinga usizo ukuze uqalise, unombuzo mayelana nesici, noma ufuna ukubika isiphazamisi, silapha ukuze sikusize.

contact.title: Xhumana Nosekelo
contact.emailDesc: Sihlose ukuphendula wonke ama-imeyili phakathi namahora angu-24.
contact.footer: Siyabonga ngokukhetha isicelo sethu sewebhu. Sizibophezele ekwenzeni ukuzizwisa kwakho kube bushelelezi futhi kujabulise ngangokunokwenzeka.

detailedFeatures.title: Usekelo Lwesici Oluningiliziwe
detailedFeatures.subtitle: Ukwahlukaniswa kwamakhono Okufaka Izwi kanye namandla okuguqula umbhalo ube inkulumo kudivayisi ngayinye.
